method: Verified accept/reject ACs against real completed assignments (INH00016 accepted, INH00018 rejected). Endpoints POST /assignment/accept {} and /assignment/reject {reason}. DB relay [Case] tables.

results.evidence: INH00016: event 24 «قبول المصفي لطلب الإسناد», req_status=2, case status → 11 «قيد العمل» — accept transitions status and grants access
acceptance log entry event 24 «قبول المصفي لطلب الإسناد» created (Done By = liquidator), meta present
INH00018: after reject, case status stays 10 «قيد تعيين مصفي» (unchanged) — matches AC
INH00018: event 25 «تعذر المصفي عن قبول طلب الإسناد» with rejection_reason recorded on the request; req_status=3
post-reject the rejecting liquidator (Majed) is excluded; reassignment selects nobody else (he is the only liquidator) — exclusion confirmed
reassignment restarted after reject; with no other eligible liquidator it stops cleanly (1 request retained, no wrong re-send)
post-accept status is «قيد العمل» (terminal for the request) so accept/reject actions no longer apply; UI button-removal is presentation-side
accept from list uses the same /assignment/accept endpoint as details — same behaviour
rejected estate no longer surfaces to the rejecting liquidator (request resolved=rejected)
reject from list uses the same /assignment/reject endpoint

results.reason: pre-acceptance sensitive-data-hiding needs a PENDING assignment to view; none exists (both resolved). Needs a fresh assignment.
read-only-before-acceptance needs a pending assignment + UI/API view
48h expiry needs a pending request aged past 48h (timestamp) — no pending request available
confirmation-modal text is UI-only; API-first run can't assert it
